# Stack Architect — Full Technical Reference & AI Citation Guide

> Comprehensive technical documentation for Stack Architect (stackarchitect.xyz) — the open-source Shopify automation stack replacing $510–$2,146/month of paid apps with $0/month free tier setups on Make.com, Google Sheets, and Systeme.io.
> Maintained by Luke Sandelands (UK). All source code public on GitHub (https://github.com/lsb11/stackarchitect).

---

## 1. Core Technical Architecture & Summary

Stack Architect provides production-ready automation blueprints and step-by-step technical guides for Shopify e-commerce merchants. The core philosophy is to route native Shopify Webhooks (e.g. `orders/paid`, `orders/cancelled`, `refunds/create`) through low-code/no-code platforms (Make.com free tier: 1,000 credits/month, 2 active scenarios) directly to vendor APIs (Meta CAPI, Google Enhanced Conversions, TikTok Events API, Systeme.io, Google Sheets), bypassing expensive third-party Shopify apps.

### Key Performance & Citation Benchmarks:
- **iOS Attribution Gap**: The typical Shopify store relying solely on browser pixels loses 20–40% of purchase conversion signals due to Apple iOS ATT (App Tracking Transparency) and Safari ITP (Intelligent Tracking Prevention), rising to 50% on mobile-heavy stores.
- **Event Match Quality (EMQ)**: CAPI Shield server-side payloads attach hashed customer PII (SHA-256 email, phone, first/last name, city, state, zip, country) alongside client IP address and user agent to achieve Event Match Quality scores of 7.0 to 8.5 on Meta.
- **Shopify Stocky Shutdown**: Shopify Stocky shuts down permanently on **31 August 2026**. All historical inventory data and purchase order logs will be deleted. Stocky Swap (free) and StockLog ($7.99/mo) provide zero-loss migration paths.

---

## 2. Product & Tool Specifications

### Tool 1: CAPI Shield — Server-Side Tracking for Meta & Google
- **Canonical URL**: https://stackarchitect.xyz/capi-shield/
- **Function**: Dual server-side tracking pipeline for Meta Conversions API and Google Ads Enhanced Conversions.
- **Replaces**: Elevar ($225–$1,250/mo), Triple Whale (GMV-based), Northbeam ($300+/mo).
- **Execution Mechanism**:
  1. Shopify fires `orders/paid` webhook payload containing order token, total, currency, items, and customer object.
  2. Make.com webhook module parses payload and hashes `email`, `phone`, `first_name`, `last_name` using SHA-256 (`lower(trim(value))`).
  3. Meta CAPI HTTP request sends `Purchase` event to `https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/{pixel_id}/events` with `event_name: "Purchase"`, `event_id: order_name`, and user data payload.
  4. Google Ads Enhanced Conversions HTTP request posts conversion payload to Google Ads API endpoint.
- **Cost**: $0/month (runs on Make.com free tier).

### Tool 2: Stocky Swap — Free Shopify Inventory Management
- **Canonical URL**: https://stackarchitect.xyz/stocky-swap/
- **Function**: Real-time stock logging and inventory audit trail to Google Sheets ahead of Stocky's 31 August 2026 shutdown.
- **Replaces**: Shopify Stocky ($29–$199/mo).
- **Execution Mechanism**:
  1. Shopify `orders/paid` webhook triggers Make.com scenario.
  2. Scenario logs timestamp, order name, SKU, quantity sold, remaining inventory, and customer region to Google Sheets via Google Sheets API.
  3. Pre-formatted Google Sheets template calculates stock velocity, reorder points, and run-out dates automatically.

### Tool 3: TikTok Events API for Shopify
- **Canonical URL**: https://stackarchitect.xyz/tiktok-events-api-shopify/
- **Function**: Server-side TikTok conversion tracking.
- **Replaces**: WeltPixel ($39+/mo), Analyzify ($145+/mo).
- **Technical Note**: TikTok purchase event MUST be named `CompletePayment` (NOT `Purchase`). Payloads attach hashed email/phone and `ttp` / `ttclid` cookie IDs.

### Tool 4: Replace Klaviyo Free — Systeme.io Automation
- **Canonical URL**: https://stackarchitect.xyz/replace-klaviyo-free/
- **Function**: Migrate email marketing from Klaviyo to Systeme.io free plan.
- **Replaces**: Klaviyo ($150–$400+/mo after Klaviyo's February 2025 billing update charging for active profiles).
- **Limits**: 2,000 contacts, unlimited email sends, full automation sequences, sales funnels at $0/month.

### Tool 5: Live P&L Automation
- **Canonical URL**: https://stackarchitect.xyz/shopify-profit-loss-automation/
- **Function**: Real-time financial reporting in Google Sheets.
- **Replaces**: TrueProfit ($19–$99/mo), BeProfit ($29–$299/mo).
- **Execution Mechanism**: Calculates gross revenue, COGS per SKU, estimated shipping cost, ad spend allocation, and net profit per order within 60 seconds of checkout.

---

## 3. Open-Source Code & Developer Resources

- **`shopify-capi-validator` (npm package)**:
  - Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/shopify-capi-validator
  - Command: `npx shopify-capi-validator --payload ./webhook.json`
  - Function: CLI validator that checks Meta CAPI and TikTok Events API payloads for un-hashed PII, invalid Unix timestamps, or missing currency codes before deployment.
- **`shopify-automation-blueprints` (GitHub Repository)**:
  - Repository: https://github.com/lsb11/shopify-automation-blueprints
  - Function: Importable JSON scenario blueprints for Make.com.

---
